title: diplacus bolanderi
intro: Diplacus bolanderi, also known as the California gilia or Bolander's gilia, is a flowering plant species within the phlox family native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Diplacus bolanderi include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Diplacus bolanderi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it is often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
